children.name: לעבור על תאריכים חשובים בחודשיים הקרובים ולהכניס לכאן
Review Google Cloud credential security best practices
seconds timer for work in progress
live blocks - work, break, idle - print to past and you can reconcile with plans, including general work plans
capacity calc should be based on actual time after a resize
start an item during a live session/plan - split/background/reconcile later?
fix the 2 insert markers - one works one not
maybe toggle compact blocks (e.g free time)?
idea - move "done" to be done under a context
maybe even the running item itself is an intention in the working so it won't show on today
change the running block intentions to not need an id - there's only one anyway, degrade when stopping
create under free time (or any time block) context fix
more context from projects menu - maybe right click and "properties" (e.g duration)
preparations (project to past) also on large projects scale!
goals and deadlines - top down, acheive
maybe if context is empty, suggest from other projects / time contexts
maybe moving to react without breaking anything
one click fix for overscheduled in free time
recurring - typical day, typical week etc
different views for "actions" - including tinder and brilly
creating an item should create it in the current time context
indicate current place in what in when in actions
search - global, not only in projects
free time calc doesn't take breaks (or running items)? in account
right click for specific time isn't good, better always show it
indicate parent when editing a time block
duration is not preserved, check why
order in a free time context
cancel plan instead of deleting it
refactor time contexts - including one time and multiple
schedule with no fixed time (under a free time block)
under time context - maybe show suggestions from the level "above" in addition to explicitly scheduled there
overview time to see all time contexts
change dynamically working time block duration
clear to default day boundary time
maybe don't delete plan when starting, so we can compare
better UI for the goal tracking, don't like current
starting a new item while one is in progress
should we filter projects to context?
clarify timers and stopwatches difference - maybe even on a bigger scale
unify past logs and planned logs
longer term planning - estimation methods for big projects. use time contexts
running context with "back to running" (can be a day or time block, or year if in plan/overview for example)
idea - starting working on automatically focuses
visible actions and projects are determined by time context
rename from project - improve style, maybe double click
fix running item time block height
ident child item entry in project
pop ups when time has arrived for x
+ button on free time should be dynamic
should find a nice animal + name for it
countdown for in progress scheduled items
when scheduling an item - ask if should create a done/time goal
starting a scheduled item doesn't work
warning when days collide (day start before prev day end)
merge styles of entries and blocks, to either direction
in free time - indicate remaining with a number
day open and close actually set the day start/end times
done logs should be rendered under a time block
after entering a project item - stay scrolled
+ in free time should be able to create both an intention and a time block
לכתוב לליאורה על האחסון או למצוא פתרון אחר

items.name: "אני אומר לכל אלה שרוצים להתעסק באומנות - אם יש שני אנשים לפחות שאוהבים את מה שאתה עושה, יש לך קהל. הם אהבו דבר שאתה עשית כי היית נאמן לעצמך, ועל כן תישאר נאמן לעצמך והקהל שלך יגדל" (מתי כספי בראיון לדני קושמרו,  N12).

children.name: לקבוע עם הרפז לתחילת שבוע הבא
